prompt: ヘルスケアアプリのデザインシステムを提案してほしい。React Nativeで作る予定で、お年寄りでも使いやすいUIにしたい。配色、フォント、アイコンの方針を教えて。できればマークダウンのドキュメントにまとめて。

assertions.name: color-palette-defined
assertions.description: Defines specific hex color codes for the palette

assertions.name: font-recommendations
assertions.description: Recommends specific font families with rationale

assertions.name: icon-library-specified
assertions.description: Recommends a specific icon library (not just 'use icons')

assertions.name: accessibility-focus
assertions.description: Addresses elderly user accessibility (large text, high contrast, large touch targets)

assertions.name: react-native-specific
assertions.description: Includes React Native specific guidance or code examples
